sysMessages.outOfSupportedAreas:
Thanks for playing!
Unfortunately, this area is not supported in multiplayer, so you may experience limited or broken functionality

deactivation.hosting: You are about to end the multiplayer session. Are you sure?

errors.unableToLoad: Connection history is corrupted and cannot be loaded

deactivation.connected: You are about to leave the multiplayer session. Are you sure?
deactivation.connecting:
Can't leave while connecting.
Please wait

playerName.title: Player Name
playerName.tooltip: Represents player name within multiplayer session. Limited to 24 characters

selectedAnswerAnimationDuration.title: Selected answer animation duration
selectedAnswerAnimationDuration.tooltip:
Duration of the animation for the selected answer (seconds).
Dialog will continue once this animation ends

nonSelectedAnswerAnimationDuration.title: Non-Selected answer animation duration
nonSelectedAnswerAnimationDuration.tooltip: Duration of the animation for all non-selected answers (seconds)

blockedAnswerAnimationDuration.title: Blocked answer animation duration
blockedAnswerAnimationDuration.tooltip: It happens when dialog owner is not allowed to select answer yet (not everyone is loaded)

hostPortRangeStart.title: Host Port Start
hostPortRangeStart.tooltip:
The first available port within the configured range is selected to host a multiplayer game. Keep this value equal to 'Host Port End' to always host on a specific port only.
Valid values are 1024-65535

hostPortRangeEnd.title: Host Port End
hostPortRangeEnd.tooltip:
The first available port within the configured range is selected to host a multiplayer game. Keep this value equal to 'Host Port Start' to always host on a specific port only.
Valid values are 1024-65535

hideServerAddress.title: Hide Server Address
hideServerAddress.tooltip: Toggles whether the server IP address is shown in the UI. When enabled, the IP address is hidden to protect privacy

trackConnectionHistory.title: Track Connection History
trackConnectionHistory.tooltip: Successfully joined games will be available for a quick join

maxConnectionHistoryRecords.title: Maximum number of stored connection history records

ping.title: Ping
ping.tooltip: Use it to quickly highlight a specific world position, unit, map object, or other target. Your ping will be visible to other players, helping you communicate important locations or points of interest

forceUnpause.title: Force Unpause
forceUnpause.tooltip: Completly removes local pause. Use this in case of any bugs with synced pause

forceCombatEnd.title: Force Combat End
forceCombatEnd.tooltip: Immediately and forcefully exit the current combat state. Use this if combat becomes stuck, desynchronized, or does not end correctly

dangerZone.title: Danger zone (make sure you know what you are doing)

defaultForcedPauseTimeout.title: Default 'Forced pause' timeout
defaultForcedPauseTimeout.tooltip:
Default delay to lift forced pause once specific criteria is met.
Basic format is 00:00:00 (but not limited to) which means Hours:Minutes:Seconds

restEncounterForcedPauseTimeout.title: Rest encounter 'Forced pause' timeout
restEncounterForcedPauseTimeout.tooltip:
Delay to lift forced pause once random rest encounter is synchronized for everyone.
Basic format is 00:00:00 (but not limited to) which means Hours:Minutes:Seconds

remoteRollRetrievalTimeout.title: Remote Roll retrieval timeout
remoteRollRetrievalTimeout.tooltip:
How long to wait for a roll from the remote source. The game stays frozen until it gets a response or hits the timeout. If it times out, we use the local roll = this leads to desync.
Make sure this value is less than or equal 'Network Awaiter Timeout'

networkAwaiterTimeout.title: Network Awaiter timeout
networkAwaiterTimeout.tooltip: Sometimes we need to make requests rather than passively listen for incoming messages. This is a generic timeout for such cases where those requests are considered failed

restEncounterSyncTimeout.title: Rest Encounter synchronization timeout
restEncounterSyncTimeout.tooltip:
Client must wait for host to generate random rest encounter data (if any).
Banter skips are synchronized for everyone, so this (generation on host, retrieval on client) should happen around the same time

enforcedCombatStartDelay.title: Enforced combat start delay
enforcedCombatStartDelay.tooltip: Combat will be started automatically after a specified delay (in seconds) if it's already started for someone else

combatTurnDelayForAI.title: AI Turn delay
combatTurnDelayForAI.tooltip:
AI turn for clients starts a bit later so AI actions can be synced/overridden from host if needed.
Keep this somewhere above your network ping

saveGameChunkSize.title: Save Game chunk size
saveGameChunkSize.tooltip:
Controls chunk size (bytes) when transferring save game over the network. Smaller chunks can improve stability on slower or unstable connections, while larger chunks may increase transfer speed on fast networks.
Changing this value can affect connection reliability and compatibility. Only modify it if you understand how networking and data transfer work. Incorrect values may cause slow transfers, connection issues, or failed uploads/downloads.

errors.invalidAddress:
Unable to parse provided server address.
Please verify your input.
errors.invalidPort:
Invalid port specified.
Acceptable range is '0 > port <= 65535'.

rolls.missingRoll:

This guarantees desync in the game
